events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail** — conductors crossing the bus gutter space instead of being dressed along the sides violates NEC 408.3(A) conductor-arrangement requirements and risks insulation damage against the bus (a latent ground-fault/short risk), plus it can eat into required gutter/bending space. Since the panel is still in-progress, this is a straightforward re-dress-and-reinspect fix, not a rip-and-replace — but it must be corrected before closing up or energizing.
